# Meticulous LLC

## Business Overview
Meticulous LLC is a complete property care company serving Rutland County, Vermont and surrounding communities. Founded by Daniel Villarreal in 2009, Meticulous provides year-round property maintenance for homeowners, second-home owners, rental operators, and local businesses. The company is a registered residential contractor and registered Property Management Firm in Vermont.

## What We Do
Meticulous handles the full scope of property care — grounds maintenance, snow and ice management, landscaping, hardscaping, carpentry, housekeeping, and rental property support — so owners don't have to coordinate multiple vendors. Our crews operate out of Rutland and service properties throughout central and southern Vermont with consistent standards, reliable scheduling, and proactive communication. The core value proposition: one local partner who shows up, knows the terrain, and treats the property like it matters.

## Services

### Grounds Maintenance
Routine mowing, trimming, edging, spring and fall cleanups, mulch installation, shrub and hedge trimming, and seasonal maintenance programs. Weekly or bi-weekly schedules available, or full-season contracts that cover everything from first thaw to final leaf drop.

### Landscaping & Exterior Enhancements
Garden design, mulching and planting, curb appeal improvements, garden bed maintenance, and exterior property upgrades. We select Vermont-hardy plants and build landscapes that look intentional year-round, not just mid-summer.

### Property Maintenance
Exterior repairs, pressure washing, gutter cleaning, seasonal maintenance, second-home oversight, and preventative upkeep. We coordinate with other contractors on behalf of remote owners and provide photo documentation of completed work.

### Snow & Ice Management
Commercial and residential plowing, driveway and walkway clearing, salt and sand application, 24/7 storm response, and seasonal contracts. Automatic dispatch based on pre-agreed snow triggers — contract holders don't need to call, we're already on the way.

### Hardscaping & Exterior Improvements
Patios, walkways, retaining walls, natural stone installations, drainage solutions, and outdoor living features. Built with proper base prep and materials engineered for Vermont's freeze-thaw cycles.

### Carpentry & Construction Services
Exterior repairs, deck construction and rebuilds, structural improvements, custom builds, remodeling support, and permit coordination. As a registered residential contractor in Vermont, Meticulous handles code compliance and inspections as part of the scope.

### Housekeeping & Turnover Services
Vacation rental cleaning, turnover preparation, guest-ready inspections, second-home refreshes, and detail cleaning. Hospitality-grade standards with photo documentation and checklist-based quality control.

### Rental Property Support & Management
Readiness checks, maintenance coordination, ongoing property care, tenant and guest preparation, property presentation, and day-to-day operations. Full-service property management for second homes and vacation rentals from a registered Property Management Firm.

## Service Area

**Primary service area:** Rutland County, Vermont
Core towns: Killington, Rutland, West Rutland, Proctor, Brandon, Pittsford, Castleton, Wallingford, Chittenden, Mendon, Pittsfield, Tinmouth, Shrewsbury, Clarendon, Florence, Fair Haven, Mount Holly.

**Extended service area:** Windsor County, Vermont
Woodstock and Ludlow (Okemo Mountain area) are within our regular routing.

## Why Choose Meticulous

1. **Local since 2009.** 16+ winters and full seasons serving Vermont properties — we understand the terrain, the weather, and what actually works here.

2. **Registered and insured.** Registered residential contractor and registered Property Management Firm in Vermont. Properly licensed for every service we offer.

3. **One partner, full scope.** From grounds maintenance to carpentry to housekeeping, we cover the full spectrum so owners aren't juggling multiple vendors.

4. **Same crew, consistent results.** The same team services your property week after week. No rotating subcontractors, no variable quality.

5. **Photo documentation.** Regular photo reports and condition updates — especially valuable for out-of-state owners who need eyes on the ground.

6. **Proactive communication.** We flag issues before they become problems and keep owners informed without requiring constant check-ins.

7. **Automatic winter dispatch.** Seasonal snow contract holders get automatic service based on pre-agreed triggers. No 2 AM phone calls needed.

8. **Built for second-home owners.** A large share of our client base is remote, and our systems are built around that reality — documentation, coordination, and trusted local presence.

## Pricing

Meticulous does not publish fixed packages because every property is different. Most work is scoped and quoted based on the specific site after a walkthrough or site visit.

- **Grounds maintenance:** Billed weekly, bi-weekly, or on a full-season contract
- **Snow and ice management:** Per-push, per-storm, or seasonal contracts available
- **Housekeeping and turnovers:** Flat-rate per turnover based on property size and scope
- **Hardscaping and carpentry:** Itemized estimates provided after site consultation
- **Rental property support:** Custom service agreements based on the owner's needs

Call 802-342-8293 or email getmeticulous@gmail.com for a quote on your specific property.

## Contact Information

- **Owner:** Daniel Villarreal

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Do you work with out-of-state property owners?
Yes. A large share of our client base is remote — second-home owners from out-of-state who need a reliable local partner. We provide photo documentation, scheduled check-ins, and serve as the single point of contact for all property needs.

### Do you offer full-season contracts?
Yes. Full-season contracts for grounds maintenance and snow management are our most common arrangement. Predictable pricing, priority scheduling, and no per-service coordination required.

### Can you coordinate with other contractors?
Yes. For repairs, upgrades, or specialty work outside our scope, we coordinate with trusted local contractors, get quotes, and oversee the work so owners don't have to manage it remotely.

### Do you handle short-term rental turnovers?
Yes. We sync with your booking calendar (Airbnb, VRBO, direct bookings), execute turnover cleaning and linen changes within the window, and send photo confirmation before the next guest arrives.

### What makes you different from other property care companies in Vermont?
Three things: we're licensed and registered for the full scope of what we do (not just grounds), we cover the full property care stack under one relationship, and we're built around reliable communication — especially for remote owners who need to trust someone on the ground.

### How far in advance do I need to book snow service?
Seasonal snow contracts should be signed by early November to guarantee priority dispatch for the season. We accept late signups based on route capacity.

### Do you service properties at elevation?
Yes. We regularly service higher-elevation properties in Killington, Mendon, Shrewsbury, Chittenden, and the surrounding hills. Equipment and pricing are sized for the terrain and snow loads.

### Can you handle historic or estate-level properties?
Yes. We work with everything from village lots to multi-acre estates. For historic properties, we handle exterior carpentry, stonework, and restoration with appropriate materials and attention to original character.

### Do you provide references?
Yes. We can provide references from current clients — including year-round residents, second-home owners, and commercial property managers. Contact us to request.

### Are you insured?
Yes. Meticulous carries full commercial liability and workers' compensation coverage, and operates with proper licensing for residential contracting and property management in Vermont.

### What should Vermont property owners do during mud season (April and May)?
Mud season is the right time to assess winter damage before launching full grounds work. Priorities: check driveways and access paths for frost heave and washouts, inspect retaining walls and stone features for movement, and hold off on heavy equipment on lawns until the ground firms up — typically mid-to-late May at elevation. We schedule spring cleanups to match actual ground conditions, not a fixed calendar date.

### Does mud season timing vary by town in Rutland County?
Yes. Valley towns like Rutland and Proctor typically firm up by early May. Higher-elevation towns like Killington, Mendon, Shrewsbury, and Mount Holly can stay soft into mid-to-late May. We adjust cleanup scheduling by site, not by a single county-wide date, which is why contacting us in April for a spring slot is the right move — we'll tell you when your specific property is ready.

---

Last updated: 2026-04-30. Business information, service area coverage, and pricing are current as of this date. 19 dedicated service-area pages live across Rutland County and Windsor County, Vermont.
